data.title: GridCARE Named to Fast Company's Annual List of the World’s Most Innovative Companies for 2026
data.description: GridCARE, a company based in Redwood City, California, has recently been recognized by Fast Company as one of the World's Most Innovative Companies for 2026. The company earned a spot in the Applied AI, Energy, and Small and Mighty categories for their work in accelerating time-to-power for modern AI factories. GridCARE is addressing a critical issue in the global AI race by providing immediate access to power, which is crucial for the rapid development of AI infrastructure. This recognition highlights GridCARE's importance in the industry as the demand for AI technology continues to grow.

data.title: Two American Originals Unite: Dr. Scholl’s Shoes and Wrangler® Debut Limited-Edition Capsule Collection
data.description: In Greensboro, North Carolina, two well-known American brands have joined forces to introduce a special collaboration. Dr. Scholl’s and Wrangler have come together to launch a limited-edition collection, set to debut on March 24th. The capsule includes five popular Dr. Scholl’s Shoes models, such as the renowned Original Sandal and the trending Time-Off Max Sneaker, in a selection of unique color schemes and patterns inspired by Wrangler's Western roots. Additionally, the collection features a denim leather trim jacket with the distinctive ‘W’ stitching.

data.title: CAMP4 Appoints Michael MacLean to its Board of Directors
data.description: The recent appointment of a new strategic and financial leader has bolstered the Company's efforts in advancing CMP-002 towards a planned first-in-human Phase 1/2 clinical trial for SYNGAP1-related disorder. This development aims to strengthen the Company's strategic direction and financial management as they move forward with CMP-002. This key decision comes at a crucial time as the Company progresses towards the clinical trial phase for SYNGAP1-related disorder, highlighting their commitment to addressing this medical condition.

data.title: BrilliA Reports Positive Operating Cash Flow and Cost Reduction for the Six Months Ended September 30, 2025
data.description: Singapore-based company BrilliA Inc. (NYSE American: BRIA), a leading provider of services and solutions for women's intimate apparel brands globally, revealed its financial performance for the six months ending September 30, 2025. CEO Kendrew Hartanto mentioned the company faced difficulties due to new tariff regulations impacting the global trade landscape. This indicates a challenging period for BrilliA amidst evolving market conditions.

data.title: Cobre Ranked No. 1 in Latin America on Fast Company’s 2026 List of the World’s Most Innovative Companies
data.description: A company based in Bogotá, Colombia, called Cobre, has been recognized as one of the World's Most Innovative Companies of 2026 by Fast Company, a prestigious honor highlighting businesses that drive industry and cultural advancements. Cobre, a leading B2B payments platform in Latin America, achieved the top spot in the region. Fast Company's list features a total of 720 honorees across 59 sectors and regions, with Cobre standing out among the World's 50 Most Innovative Companies. This acknowledgement underscores the innovative contributions of businesses in Latin America.

data.title: Aben Gold Corp. Assesses Historical Tungsten Results from 2014 Re-Assay Program and Plans 2026 Exploration Program to Target Both Tungsten and Gold at the Justin Project
data.description: In Vancouver, BC on March 24, 2026, Aben Gold Corp. (TSX-V: ABM) (OTCID: ABNAF) (Frankfurt: ML1) is currently evaluating the high-grade tungsten findings from the October 16, 2014 News Release at its Justin Gold Project in southeast Yukon. The company, holding 100% ownership of the project, is also preparing for an extensive 2026 exploration initiative. This program will encompass both tungsten and gold objectives with the aim of fully assessing the property's potential for multiple metals.

data.title: Outlook Therapeutics Announces Pricing of $5.0 Million Public Offering
data.description: Iselin, New Jersey, March 24, 2026 - Today, Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: OTLK), a biopharmaceutical company specializing in advancing the standard of care for bevacizumab in treating retina diseases, disclosed the pricing details of its recently announced public offering. The offering consists of 20,000,000 shares of common stock and accompanying warrants for the purchase of up to an additional 20,000,000 shares. Each share and accompanying warrant are set at a public offering price of $0.25, with expectations to generate gross proceeds of $5.0 million, before the deduction of placement agent fees and other offering expenses. The common warrants will carry an exercise price of $0.25 per share, immediate exercisability, and a validity period of five years from the date of issuance. The offering is slated to conclude on or near March 25, 2026, pending the fulfillment of standard closing conditions.

data.title: Biopharmaceutical company NRx Pharmaceuticals (NRXP) releases 2025 full-year results, emphasizing regulatory and commercial advancements.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the annual revenue of a major tech company reached a record-breaking $100 billion in the last fiscal year. The company's net income also saw a significant increase, rising by 25% to $20 billion. This growth was attributed to the success of their latest product launches and expansion into new markets. Additionally, their workforce expanded to over 50,000 employees worldwide. The company's CEO expressed satisfaction with these results and outlined plans for further expansion and innovation in the coming year.

data.title: Rezolute Provides Update on its Congenital Hyperinsulinism Program Following FDA Meeting
data.description: The FDA has recommended the company to provide detailed data from both the sunRIZE trial and the continuing open-label extension to guide future actions for the program. This step is crucial for the program's progression and effectiveness, ensuring thorough evaluation and decision-making. It is important to meticulously compile and present all relevant information from these sources to inform the next phases of the program. The transparency and completeness of this data submission will be significant in determining the program's advancement and potential impact.

data.title: Red Cross aids thousands after early 2026 disasters, as forecasters warn of elevated spring risks nationwide
data.description: An organization is advocating for Disaster Relief contributions on Red Cross Giving Day, scheduled for March 25. With experts cautioning about heightened spring storm, flood, and wildfire threats across the country, the American Red Cross is calling on individuals to make donations on Giving Day to support families in need. This event aims to gather support for disaster response efforts during a critical period. It encourages people to contribute towards the cause to assist vulnerable families facing emergencies.

data.title: Polkadot aims for $1.53 bounce as price sits at $1.40, RSI at 42.67. Possible recovery to $1.53 if $1.37 holds.
data.description: The cryptocurrency DOT is currently trading at $1.40, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 42.67. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a recovery to $1.53 resistance level if the bulls are able to maintain support at $1.37 in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: ModulEdge and Comino Partner to Deliver Turnkey On-Premise AI Infrastructure for European Enterprises
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 24, 2026, ModulEdge, a company based in Prague specializing in modular data centers, disclosed a new partnership with Comino, a prominent provider of liquid cooling solutions from Riga, Latvia. The collaboration aims to provide advanced on-premise AI infrastructure to customers across Europe and the MENA region. This initiative is set to combine ModulEdge's expertise in modular data centers with Comino's innovative liquid cooling technology to deliver enhanced integrated solutions.

data.description: Dubai, United Arab Emirates - On March 24, 2026, Robo.ai Inc. disclosed its intention to expand its intelligent data business segment. The company, trading on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AIIO, unveiled plans to grow its capacity following the successful delivery of the first set of real-world interaction data.
